name: Equal Exchange
description: Worker-owned fair trade coffee, chocolate, tea, and snacks sourced from small-farmer cooperatives worldwide.

name: Just Coffee Cooperative
description: Worker-owned fair-trade, organic coffee roasting co-op in Madison, WI. Free shipping on all US orders.

name: Slow Bloom Coffee Cooperative
description: Worker-owned specialty coffee roaster in Redlands, CA. Formed when unionized workers were laid off by their prior employer.

name: Higher Grounds Trading Co.
description: Worker-owned coffee roaster sourcing directly from farmer cooperatives in Mexico, Central America, and East Africa.

name: Afterglow Coffee Cooperative
description: Worker-owned specialty coffee roaster in Richmond, VA, shipping sustainably sourced coffees and brewing equipment nationally.

name: Dean's Beans Organic Coffee
description: Worker-owned organic coffee roaster focused on cooperative sourcing and social justice, based in Orange, MA.

name: Justseeds Artists' Cooperative
description: Worker-owned cooperative of 40 North American printmakers selling posters, prints, and publications rooted in social and environmental movements.

name: Stocksy United
description: Artist-owned stock photography cooperative — buy licensed photos while supporting the creators who own the platform.

name: Magnum Photos
description: The legendary photographer-owned cooperative (est. 1947) selling fine art prints, photobooks, and archive prints.

name: Green Mountain Spinnery
description: Worker-owned cooperative in Putney, VT producing certified organic, US-grown natural fiber yarns and knitting patterns since 1981.

name: TESA Collective
description: Worker-owned publisher and game studio selling cooperative-themed board games, books, and educational tools for activists and organizers.

name: Microcosm Publishing
description: Worker-owned independent publisher and distributor of books, zines, stickers, and DIY resources covering cycling, feminism, and social justice.

name: Worx Printing
description: Worker-owned, union print-on-demand cooperative in Worcester, MA offering custom apparel, merch, and accessories.

name: Radix Printing & Publishing Cooperative
description: NYC's only worker-owned union print shop, offering offset, letterpress, and digital printing services from Brooklyn.

name: Collective Copies
description: Worker-owned print shop based in Western Massachusetts offering printing, copying, and design services.

name: Out of the Fog
description: Worker-owned screen printing and custom apparel co-op based in San Francisco.

name: Design Action Collective
description: The longest-running worker-owned, unionized graphic design firm in the US, serving nonprofits, unions, and social justice campaigns.

name: Agaric
description: Worker-owned web development cooperative building open-source digital tools and websites for mission-driven organizations.

name: CoLab Cooperative
description: Worker-owned digital agency in Ithaca, NY building custom websites and apps for socially responsible organizations since 2010.

name: Palante Technology Cooperative
description: Brooklyn-based worker cooperative providing web development and digital security consulting exclusively to progressive nonprofits.

name: Loomio
description: Worker-owned cooperative making collaborative decision-making software used by cooperatives and nonprofits worldwide.

name: Artisan Beverage Cooperative
description: Worker-owned cooperative in Greenfield, MA brewing Katalyst Kombucha and Ginger Libation beverages.
